# Your New Business

> URL: https://community-prediction-market.onrender.com

> polymarket but the events for the predictions are created by anyone and they can get 1% of fee from the liquidity pool or whatever you think is best from market landscape persective.

## About

Your New Business is an AI-powered business. This file provides a brief overview for
language model crawlers and AI assistants.

## Pages

- /: Home — learn about Your New Business and get started
- /blog: Blog — articles, updates, and insights
- /blog/[slug]: Individual blog posts
